assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls builder.Services.AddIdentityServer() to register IdentityServer services in DI
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows AddIdentityServer() as Step 2 with complete code examples.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddInMemoryApiScopes with a scope named 'api1'
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows AddInMemoryApiScopes(Config.ApiScopes) pattern with in-memory store configuration.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddInMemoryClients with a client having ClientId 'm2m.client' and AllowedGrantTypes set to ClientCredentials
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows AddInMemoryClients pattern and client configuration is well-documented in the skill.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls app.UseIdentityServer() in the middleware pipeline before app.UseAuthorization()
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pipeline Ordering Rules table explicitly shows UseIdentityServer (order 3) before UseAuthorization (order 4).
SKILL.md Pipeline Ordering Rules table shows UseRouting (order 2) before UseIdentityServer (order 3).
